name: Nebula Forge Chief Engineer
description: Nebula Forge Chief Engineer — station systems monitoring, repair scheduling, diagnostics, and power grid management for space station operations.

conversation_starters.title: Station System Status
conversation_starters.text: Show me the current status of all station systems.

conversation_starters.title: Schedule a Repair
conversation_starters.text: I need to schedule a repair for the Atmospheric Recycler Unit Alpha. Help me set up the repair task.

conversation_starters.title: Run System Diagnostics
conversation_starters.text: Run a full diagnostic on the Primary Fusion Reactor and give me the health report.

conversation_starters.title: Power Grid Overview
conversation_starters.text: Give me a full overview of the station power grid — output, consumption, and any alerts.
